# Job Description Templates — AI & Data Roles

> Recurring job descriptions for Avanade AI & Data practice. **Each role has its own dedicated file.**
>
> Use: Select the relevant template file, copy its content into your evaluation markdown, and customize candidate details.

---

---

## 🚀 How to Use

### Step 1: Select the Template
Browse the table above and choose the role that matches your evaluation.

### Step 2: Copy Content
Click on the template file link, copy the entire content.

### Step 3: Paste into Evaluation
Paste the template into your evaluation markdown file under the **Job Description** section.

### Step 4: Customize (Optional)
- Adjust location/country if needed
- Add role-specific context
- Reference this file for documentation

### Example Structure
```markdown
# Evaluation — [Candidate Name] — [JD Title]

## Job Description

[Paste template content here]

## Input Candidate Profile

[Candidate details]

## Playbook Execution

[Run agents 01–05]
```

---

## 📋 Template Structure

Each template includes:
- **Header:** Country, Cities, Language Requirements
- **Job Description:** Sobre a vaga (context + purpose)
- **Benefits:** 13 Avanade standard benefits
- **Responsibilities:** 10–12 key responsibilities
- **Qualifications:**
  - Requisitos obrigatórios (mandatory skills)
  - Diferenciais (nice-to-have)

---

---

## 💡 Tips

- **Version Control:** Always reference this index in your evaluation for transparency
- **Consistency:** Use same templates across team to maintain brand voice
- **Updates:** When adding new templates, update this index and repo memory
- **Team Sharing:** Share this folder link with recruiting team for easy access
